data_type: User-Selected Files (Documents, photos, any file content)
description: The WebView frontend triggers a file chooser. The app opens the Android system file picker (type */*) allowing the user to select any file from device storage. The selected file URIs are returned to the WebView's JavaScript context for upload to the Home Assistant server.

flow_steps.details: WebView triggers a file upload input. The app creates a FileChooserRequest and emits it to the UI.
The Android system file picker (type */*) opens, allowing the user to select any file from their device (photos, documents, downloads, etc.).
Selected file URIs are returned to the WebView's JavaScript context, which uploads the file content to the Home Assistant server via the frontend's own upload mechanism.
